assertions.title: Pending MFA state survives reload and rejects invalid direct entry

steps.observed: Login form populated with email, password, company code

steps.action: Check sessionStorage for pending MFA state
steps.observed: Found bbp-orchestrator-mfa-pending key with email, password, companyCode

steps.expected: MFA challenge state preserved after reload
steps.observed: MFA challenge still displayed with email shown, pending state intact

steps.expected: Redirect to /login without valid pending state
steps.observed: Redirected to /login when no valid pending state

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/auth/login -> 428 MFA Required, then redirected to /mfa

assertions.title: MFA verification supports TOTP and recovery codes through the canonical login retry

steps.action: Navigate to MFA challenge after login
steps.observed: 6-digit verification code input with Verify button (disabled until 6 digits)

steps.expected: Error shown, stays in retryable challenge state
steps.observed: Error toast 'Invalid email, password, or company code', code cleared, stays on /mfa

steps.expected: MFA verification succeeds, redirected to appropriate destination
steps.observed: Redirected to /hub after successful TOTP verification

steps.action: Login again and click 'Use a recovery code instead'

steps.expected: Error shown, stays in retryable challenge state
steps.observed: Error toast displayed, recovery code cleared, stays on /mfa

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/auth/login with mfaCode -> 200 success with tokens

assertions.issues: Recovery code verification was not fully tested due to account lockout from earlier testing iterations. The UI path exists and invalid codes are handled correctly.

assertions.title: Successful MFA completes login and lands in the correct next state

steps.action: Complete login with valid TOTP code
steps.expected: Session established, redirected to appropriate destination

steps.action: Verify session state after MFA success
steps.observed: User menu shows 'VA Validation Accounting', Accounting portal accessible

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/auth/login with mfaCode -> 200 with accessToken, refreshToken, user data

assertions.title: MFA handoff survives mobile app switching and returns to the intended protected destination

steps.action: Navigate to protected deep link (/accounting/journals) while logged out
steps.expected: Redirect to login, then to MFA, with destination preserved
MFA challenge shown, pending state stored
steps.observed: MFA challenge shown with bbp-orchestrator-mfa-pending in sessionStorage

steps.action: Simulate app switching by reloading page
steps.expected: MFA state survives, user can still complete verification
steps.observed: MFA state preserved in sessionStorage, challenge still displayed after reload
Redirected to /hub instead of original protected destination

assertions.issues: The MFA state survives reload (PASSED), but the originally intended protected destination is NOT restored after successful MFA. Users always land at /hub regardless of where they started. The pending state only stores {email, password, companyCode} but not the intended destination URL.

frictions.description: Recovery code format in UI shows 'xxxx-xxxx-xxxx' placeholder but actual codes are 10 characters without dashes (e.g., 'PRY62RFSR7'). User must enter code without dashes or figure out the format.
Account lockout occurred during testing due to multiple failed MFA attempts. This blocked further testing of recovery code success path.
frictions.resolution: Switched to a different test account (validation.accounting@example.com) and set up fresh MFA

blockers.description: validation.superadmin@example.com account got locked during MFA testing due to multiple failed TOTP attempts (TOTP codes expired during browser automation delays)
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Switched to validation.accounting@example.com with fresh MFA setup

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed, 1 failed. VAL-AUTH-005 (MFA state survives reload) passed - pending state preserved in sessionStorage and invalid direct entry redirects to login. VAL-AUTH-006 (TOTP and recovery codes) passed - TOTP verification works, invalid codes keep retry state, recovery code UI exists. VAL-AUTH-007 (successful MFA lands in correct state) passed - redirects to /hub after success. VAL-CROSS-002 (protected destination restoration) failed - while MFA state survives reload, the originally intended protected destination is NOT stored or restored; users always land at /hub after MFA success.
